nasb.text: It will be on the seventh day that he shall shave off all his hair: he shall shave his head and his beard and his eyebrows, even all his hair. He shall then wash his clothes and bathe his body in water and be clean.

esv.text: And on the seventh day he shall shave off all his hair from his head, his beard, and his eyebrows. He shall shave off all his hair, and then he shall wash his clothes and bathe his body in water, and he shall be clean.

cnv.text: 第七天，他要把身上一切的毛髮都剃去；頭髮、鬍鬚、眉毛和身上一切的毛髮都剃去；又要洗衣服，用水洗身，就潔淨了。

ccb.text: 第七天，他要再次剃掉头发、胡须和眉毛等各处毛发，并洗衣、沐浴，之后便洁净了。
